news.headline: DeFi TVL plunges $45B since Trump's US election, dropping to $92.6B by March 10. Ethereum's net outflow hits $1.8B weekly amid price declines. Pectra upgrade faces issues in boosting layer 2 efficiency for Ethereum.
news.summary: The total value of cryptocurrencies locked in DeFi protocols has dropped from $138 billion to $92.6 billion since Donald Trump became US President in November 2024. Ethereum's TVL has decreased by $45 billion and its price has not surpassed its record high of $4,787 from November 2021. However, there has been a weekly net exchange outflow of nearly 800,000 Ether worth $1.8 billion, suggesting a strategic buying opportunity for holders. The upcoming Pectra upgrade for Ethereum aims to reduce congestion and gas fees, but has faced setbacks in its rollout on the Sepolia testnet due to errors and empty blocks being mined.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: Competitiveness and growth are required to gain needed fiscal space.
Quarterwave partners with RFMW to offer advanced antenna solutions for industries like Smart Farming and IoT.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, a significant partnership has been declared between Quarterwave UG and RFMW. Quarterwave UG, known for its innovative antenna solutions, has joined forces with RFMW, a reputable distributor of RF and microwave components. This collaboration aims to boost the exposure of Quarterwave’s state-of-the-art antenna designs in sectors such as Smart Farming, Industrial IoT, and telecommunications. With a wealth of experience in RF totaling over 40 years and boasting more than 50 patents along with 100 customized antenna designs, this partnership is set to make a substantial impact.

news.headline: Lessen partners with RealPage to enhance property operations, offering streamlined services for managers.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Lessen, a top tech-driven outsourced real estate property services provider, has revealed a new collaboration with RealPage, a prominent property management software firm. This integration will empower Lessen to offer more efficient on-demand services by linking with the Lessen360™ platform. The partnership ensures seamless connectivity for multifamily property managers, enhancing operational efficiency and flexibility. Lessen360™, a cloud-based platform, will now provide enhanced capabilities, benefiting a wide range of property managers.

news.headline: Enterprise Connect Expo Hall at Gaylord Palms, Orlando will feature hundreds of products and services for tech leaders to improve communication, collaboration, and CX strategies.
news.summary: Attention tech leaders and communication enthusiasts! Enterprise Connect, the top conference for enterprise communications and customer experience, is happening on March 17-20, 2025 at the Gaylord Palms in Orlando, FL. This event will showcase cutting-edge products and services from numerous sponsors and exhibitors in the Expo Hall, providing valuable insights to enhance communication, collaboration, and customer experience strategies. Don't miss out on this opportunity - register now to be a part of this exceptional event!

news.headline: Report by Bitwarden and 451 Research shows enterprise reliance on passwords, emphasizing need for stronger IAM strategies.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, Bitwarden, a reputable company in password and secrets management, disclosed data from a study conducted with 451 Research, a division of S&P Global Market Intelligence. The report, named 'Risk Reduction and Resilience Starts with Enterprise Password Management,' delves into obstacles faced by enterprises in identity and access management (IAM) and emphasizes the significance of robust password management in enhancing security measures. This comprehensive report sheds light on the critical role of secure passwords in safeguarding sensitive information.

news.headline: GoNetspeed to bring $2.5 million fiber internet to Wells and Ogunquit, connecting 3,700 locations starting this spring.
news.summary: In Wells and Ogunquit, residents will soon have access to high-speed 100% fiber internet through GoNetspeed. The company, known as the northeast’s largest independent fiber builder, has announced a $2.5 million investment to bring this service to over 3,700 locations in the two towns. Construction is set to start in the upcoming spring, with the initial residents and businesses projected to be connected to the fiber network shortly.

news.headline: Michelle Obama, with brother Craig Robinson, to host video podcast through Higher Ground, interviewing celebs & providing tips.
news.summary: Under the banner of her production company Higher Ground, Mrs. Obama, will collaborate with her brother, Craig Robinson, to host interviews with celebrities and provide guidance on a range of subjects.

news.headline: Inventor from McKenney, Va creates NICK WALKER STEW for quick & tasty meal, perfect for cold days.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 10, 2025, a inventor from McKenney, Virginia introduced the NICK WALKER STEW, a fully prepared dish that can be served in minutes. The creator aimed to offer a convenient and delicious option for cold winter days. The stew has quickly gained attention for its ease of preparation and comforting flavors.

news.headline: Bridgestone introduces 2 new tires with ENLITEN tech and digital service dispatch at TMC 2025. #BridgestoneAmericas
news.summary: Today in Nashville, Tennessee, Bridgestone Americas (Bridgestone) introduced two new tires - the Bridgestone R273 Ecopia for the steer position and the Bridgestone Duravis M705 for mixed fleet vehicles in pick up and delivery (P&D) and last-mile delivery (LMD) operations. The R273 Ecopia is designed for the steer position, while the Duravis M705 is tailored for mixed fleet vehicles. These tires aim to enhance performance and efficiency for regional and delivery fleets. The announcement was made on March 10, 2025, showcasing Bridgestone's commitment to innovation in the tire industry.

news.headline: Novogradac promotes Peter Lawrence to Chief Public Policy Officer, showcasing commitment to public policy leadership.
news.summary: Novogradac, a leading national accounting and consulting firm, demonstrated its dedication to public policy leadership by elevating Peter Lawrence to the position of Chief Public Policy Officer on March 10, 2025. Lawrence will spearhead public policy initiatives for the firm, showcasing their commitment to promoting effective policies.

news.headline: BIG3 and NBL to bring first international showcase to Australia in November 2025, featuring world-class talent. #basketball
news.summary: The BIG3, a premier basketball league, is set to bring its top talent to Australia for the first time in November 2025. This international tour marks a significant milestone for the league, known for its competitive play and star-studded rosters. The BIG3 Showcase in Australia will feature world-class athletes showcasing their skills in front of a new audience. This event, scheduled for November 2025, is expected to draw immense interest and excitement among basketball fans in both the United States and Australia. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking tour.

news.headline: LIGHTSTRIKE introduces a unique hard refresher with 5% ABV, featuring coconut water and sea salt for a refreshing twist.
news.summary: A game-changing hard refresher called LIGHTSTRIKE is making waves in the industry. Launched in Fort Collins, Colo., on March 10, 2025, this unique beverage brings a fresh approach to the established hard refresher category. Unlike traditional products, LIGHTSTRIKE offers a non-alcoholic inspired alternative with a blend of coconut water, sea salt, and 5% alcohol by volume (ABV). The introduction of LIGHTSTRIKE marks a shift in the market, appealing to consumers looking for a refreshing, low-alcohol option.

news.headline: Daelight Solutions becomes Veeva Premier Services Partner for Veeva Development Cloud in March 2025. #DigitalSolutions #LifeSciences
news.summary: A reputable company based in Princeton, NJ, has made a significant advancement in the digital solutions sector for life sciences. Daelight Solutions has been recognized as a Premier Services Partner for Veeva Development Cloud, showcasing their leadership in this field. This achievement, announced on March 10, 2025, is a testament to their commitment to excellence and innovation, positioning them at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Corellium reports record growth in virtualization platform for smart devices, from phones to critical infrastructure.
news.summary: Corellium, a key player in the technology industry, has introduced a one-of-a-kind virtualization platform tailored for developers to construct, evaluate, and safeguard software for various smart devices including phones, vehicles, and essential infrastructure. The company, headquartered in Delray Beach, Florida, made this announcement on March 10, 2025. This innovative platform will enable developers to efficiently work on software development for a wide range of smart devices, contributing to advancements in the field.

news.headline: Arrest in Wichita, KS can be stressful. Your words matter. Be cautious. Important tips shared.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Wichita, Kansas, it was emphasized how crucial it is to manage oneself effectively when facing arrest, as the way a person behaves during these essential moments can significantly shape their future. Each word spoken, as well as those left unspoken, hold weight and can sway the end result of the legal proceedings. It is imperative to be mindful of one's actions and words during such situations to ensure the best possible outcome for their case.

news.headline: Boone's Horton Hotel & Rooftop Lounge unveils expansion with new luxury rooms and amenities to enhance guest experience.
news.summary: In Boone, North Carolina on March 10, 2025, the Horton Hotel & Rooftop Lounge is embarking on a significant expansion. This luxury boutique hotel and rooftop lounge located in downtown Boone is set to undergo a transformation to enhance its luxury experiences. The expansion project aims to elevate the hotel's offerings and provide an enhanced experience for guests. This exciting development reflects the commitment of The Horton to provide top-notch services and amenities. Stay tuned for more updates on this expansion project.

news.headline: Kristin MacCarthy appointed as CFO of SBI Growth with over 25 years of financial experience.
news.summary: In Dallas on March 10, 2025, SBI Growth, a prominent growth advisory company, has revealed the selection of Kristin MacCarthy as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). MacCarthy brings over 25 years of financial management expertise spanning various sectors to her new role.

news.headline: Conference Board ETI declined in Feb to 108.56 from 109.45 in Jan, reflecting uncertainty in employment trends.
news.summary: In February 2025, the Conference Board Employment Trends Index™ (ETI) decreased to 108.56 from the revised 109.45 in January. The ETI serves as a crucial composite index for monitoring payroll employment trends. This decline indicates a shift amidst uncertainties impacting job market dynamics.

news.headline: Seven cities collaborate to provide financial counseling for entrepreneurs through the Small Business Boost Cohort program, supported by Principal® Foundation.
news.summary: National nonprofit The Cities for Financial Empowerment Fund (CFE Fund) has introduced a new Small Business Boost Cohort to aid small business owners. In a recent statement on March 10, 2025, CFE Fund disclosed that this initiative, supported by Principal® Foundation, aims to bolster small businesses across the nation. The program seeks to provide essential resources and guidance to entrepreneurs navigating the challenges of running small businesses. This development signifies a significant step towards uplifting the small business community, with the backing of a well-known foundation.

news.headline: Zone 5 Technologies switches to Unanet ERP GovCon for efficient operations; Unanet leading provider of ERP for GovCon.
news.summary: Unanet, a prominent provider of project-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) and customer relationship management (CRM) solutions for the government contracting (GovCon) sector, declared a strategic business move on March 10, 2025, with its headquarters situated in DULLES, Va. The initiative aims to enhance business operations and compliance. The organization's decision is anticipated to streamline processes significantly.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: We are sceptical on EU bonds per se, but we support European projects in the defence area
150 advocates gather in Washington, D.C. for Duchenne policy reforms led by PPMD to end Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Parent Project Muscular Dystrophy (PPMD), a non-profit working to combat Duchenne muscular dystrophy, will bring together over 150 advocates to visit Capitol Hill. The group aims to engage with Congressional leaders on efforts to combat Duchenne.

news.headline: Advanced Ceramics Market to reach $16.27B by 2029 - MarketsandMarkets™ Report. Includes various materials, applications, end-use industries.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, a report on the global advanced ceramics market was released in Delray Beach, Florida. The report covers various materials such as alumina, zirconia, titanate, silicon carbide, and piezo ceramic, as well as different applications like monolithic ceramics, ceramic matrix composites, ceramic coatings, and ceramic filters. This market analysis includes data on the end-use industries involved.

news.headline: TCL introduces new QM7K Precise Dimming Series TV with Bang & Olufsen sound. Improved QD-Mini LED picture quality and HDR.
news.summary: Announcing a significant advancement in TV technology, TCL®, a top technology company, unveiled the latest Precise Dimming Series in its 2025 TV collection. This innovation takes QD-Mini LED to new heights, promising improved picture quality and heightened HDR impact. Based in Irvine, California, the company's move aims to offer consumers a more enhanced viewing experience. The announcement was made on March 10, 2025. TCL® is recognized globally as a top seller and forefront technology innovator, maintaining its position as an industry leader.

news.headline: Middle East Tennessee Tourism Council awards winners at East Tennessee Legislative Luncheon. #9LakesOfEastTennessee #TourismExcellence
news.summary: Located in Knoxville, Tennessee, on March 10, 2025, the Middle East Tennessee Tourism Council (METTC), known as the 9 Lakes of East Tennessee, showcased the annual Excellence in Tourism awards at the East Tennessee Legislative Luncheon. This event was graced by state and local representatives, highlighting the tourism achievements in the region.

news.headline: Zevia's new campaign with Jelly Roll promotes unsugarcoated realness, debuted during American Idol with a full video.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Zevia, the zero-sugar soda brand, launched a campaign featuring Grammy-nominated artist Jelly Roll, created by Ryan Reynolds’ Maximum Effort. The ad premiered during American Idol with Jelly Roll arriving at a gas station in a red pickup truck. The full video can be watched online. The ad showcases unsugarcoated realness as onlookers are mesmerized by the scene. The campaign aims to celebrate authenticity and healthy choices. This news highlights the growing trend towards healthier alternatives in the beverage industry.

news.headline: Miraclesuit introduces Body by Miraclesuit™, a collection of shaping dresses.
news.summary: A new collection called Body by Miraclesuit™ has been launched by Miraclesuit®, featuring innovative shaping dresses. The collection is targeted at individuals looking to enhance their silhouette and features advanced shaping technology to provide a flattering fit. The launch has created a buzz in the fashion industry with its promise of transforming one's appearance.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: Germany is open to common EU financing for concrete plans.

EngageLab boosts B2B e-commerce platforms with cutting-edge email solutions to optimize customer engagement.
news.summary: A globally renowned customer engagement platform, EngageLab focuses on tackling email campaign difficulties encountered by major B2B e-commerce sites.

news.headline: Schouw & Co. starts buy-back program, to acquire up to DKK 50 million worth of shares by March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Schouw & Co. has announced the commencement of a share repurchase plan on 2 January 2025, in line with Company Announcement no. 70 issued on 23 December 2024. The plan allows Schouw & Co. to repurchase company shares worth a maximum of DKK 50 million between 2 January and 31 March 2025.

news.headline: Millicom (Tigo) makes share buybacks, boosting investor confidence.
Phoenix Aviation Capital, AIP Capital, and LuminArx acquire 3 Airbus A330-300 planes leased to China Airlines & EVA Air.
news.summary: Phoenix Aviation Capital, a full-service aircraft lessor, has leased acquired aircraft to China Airlines and EVA Air. The companies announced the deal from Dublin, Stamford, Conn., and New York on March 10, 2025. AIP Capital, an alternative investment manager, is also involved in this transaction. The exact number of aircraft and financial specifics were not mentioned in the news article.

news.headline: Trump administration planned to sell off hundreds of govt properties, including Labor Department's HQ / Frances Perkins Building.
news.summary: The failed attempt by the Trump administration to sell hundreds of government properties, including the Labor Department's headquarters at the Frances Perkins Building, highlighted a long-discussed idea. The plan aimed to sell off various properties with the goal of reducing government holdings. This action drew attention to the proposal that had been under consideration for a considerable amount of time.

news.headline: Trump plans new tariffs on steel and aluminum, impacting critical industries reliant on foreign imports.
news.summary: President Donald Trump's proposal to implement additional tariffs on steel and aluminum may inadvertently affect various crucial American sectors that heavily depend on importing goods from other countries.

news.headline: REDCON1 & Hostess® join forces to launch iconic flavors in protein powders & shakes. Partnership to last for several years.
news.summary: In a joint press release on March 10, 2025, Hostess® and REDCON1 revealed a new collaboration that aims to revolutionize protein products. This multi-year partnership marks a significant milestone for both companies, with Hostess® known for its popular sweet baked snacks and REDCON1 recognized as a prominent player in the Sports Nutrition sector. The agreement signals an exciting opportunity for the two brands to combine their expertise and creativity to introduce groundbreaking protein offerings to consumers. This exclusive deal underscores the commitment of Hostess® and REDCON1 to delivering innovative products and enhancing their presence in the market.

news.headline: Global Micro Mobile Data Center Market set to reach $24.17B by 2029, up from $10.29B in 2023, fueled by edge/cloud computing growth, says research report.
news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Micro Mobile Data Center Market - Global Industry Size, Share, Trends, Opportunity, and Forecast, 2019-2029F" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for Micro Mobile Data Centers achieved a value of USD 10.29 Billion in 2023 and is projected to hit USD 24.17 Billion by 2029 with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.12%. This sector within the data center industry emphasizes portable, compact, and scalable solutions.

news.headline: EU's Dombrovskis: The EU stands ready to give what's needed to Ukraine.
ECB's Nagel: We shouldn't speculate on the outcome of the next meeting
EU's Dombrovskis: We are to start talks on defense spending flexibility
German Finance Minister Kukies: The Greens have legitimate points, agreements can be found.
Dow Jones falls 500 points due to Trump's recession comments. Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla stocks sold off.
news.summary: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average plummeted by 500 points following President Trump's statement that did not dismiss the possibility of a recession. This led to significant sell-offs for tech giants Apple, Nvidia, and Tesla.

news.headline: El Rio Grande Latin Market in Texas partners with RELEX for improved pricing and promotions strategy, aiming for competitive prices and better shopping experience.
news.summary: El Rio Grande Latin Market, a prominent grocery chain with stores across Texas focusing on Latin American goods, has chosen RELEX Solutions to enhance their pricing and promotions strategy. The shift from manual methods to AI technology is expected to aid El Rio Grande in providing better prices, boosting promotional impact, and elevating the shopping experience. This decision marks a significant advancement for the company as they aim to streamline operations and improve customer satisfaction with this advanced solution.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: I hope there will be more talks with the Greens to convince them to support debt brake reform
ECB's Nagel: We are in an environment that makes necessary analysis of data each time, do not want to speculate what will happen at the next ECB sitting
Bodwé's WBK Engineering named 2025 Medium Firm of the Year by ACEC Illinois.
news.summary: In St. Charles, Illinois on March 10, 2025, Bodwé Professional Services Group revealed that its subsidiary, WBK Engineering (WBK), has been honored as the Medium Firm of the Year for 2025 by the American Council of Engineering Companies (ACEC) of Illinois. The recognition was bestowed at the ACEC awards ceremony, highlighting WBK Engineering's excellence in the field.

news.headline: German Finance Minister Kukies: German coalition plan has strong growth impact.
